name: human-design-natal-bot
description: Telegram bot for natal chart collection, calculation, interpretation, and request history.

scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check src/bot/bot.js && node --check src/services/chartService.js && node --check src/services/interpretationService.js && node --check src/services/compatibilityService.js && node --check src/services/dailyForecastService.js && node --check src/services/pdfReportService.js
